creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
Created attachment 177545
devel/protobuf3 new port shar

New port devel/protobuf3 adds 3.1.0 library. Based on Vanilla's devel/protobuf port (currently version 2.6.1). Marked as CONFLICTS_INSTALL with devel/protobuf because install conflicting files (executable and headers). This is important dependency for new ports.
Best regards,
Tomek CEDRO
